Metadata.title: MakeSkins – Create your Minecraft skin from a photo
Metadata.description: Upload your photo and get a custom Minecraft skin in seconds. Free, no account needed, ready for PC, console and mobile.

Hero.title:
Your face,
in Minecraft
Hero.subtitle: Upload a photo and become a Minecraft character in seconds. No installs, no accounts.

HowItWorks.title: That easy
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose a photo where your face is clearly visible. The clearer, the better your character will look.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: If you use the camera, we automatically frame your face. If you upload from gallery, you can adjust the crop yourself.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Download the PNG file and use it in Minecraft Java, Bedrock, consoles or mobile.

Converter.tipsGood1: Face forward, looking at the camera
Converter.tipsGood2: Well lit (near a window works great)
Converter.tipsGood3: Face fills most of the photo
Converter.tipsBad3: Wearing a hat, sunglasses or mask
Converter.qualityDark: This photo looks a bit dark — the result may not be perfect. You can continue anyway.
Converter.cropHint: Resize the square so your face fills it completely
Converter.cropGuide: Move and resize until your face fills the whole square
Converter.errorDesc: We couldn't generate your character. Try a different photo or try again.
Converter.downloadHint: PNG · 64×64 px · Compatible with Java and Bedrock
Converter.shareNotSupported: Download the skin and share it from your phone

Footer.tagline: Made with blocks and lots of love.
Footer.disclaimer: MakeSkins is not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft. Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Studios.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. Here's how MakeSkins works.
Privacy.noDataDesc: MakeSkins processes everything locally in your browser. Your photos are never sent to any server. Once you close the tab, the image is gone forever.
Privacy.noAccountDesc: You don't need to create an account or enter any personal data. We don't collect emails or names.
Privacy.cookiesDesc: MakeSkins uses Google AdSense to display advertising. AdSense may use cookies to personalize ads based on your interests. You can accept or decline advertising cookies in the banner shown when you arrive. If you decline, only cookies strictly necessary for the app to function will be used.
Privacy.contactDesc: Questions? Write to us at salvaescalerasperea@gmail.com.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.freeDesc: MakeSkins is free. We don't charge for generating Minecraft skins or require registration.
Terms.mojangTitle: Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft
Terms.mojangDesc: MakeSkins is an independent project and is not affiliated with, sponsored or endorsed by Mojang Studios or Microsoft Corporation. Minecraft® is a trademark of Mojang Studios.
Terms.licenseDesc: Generated skins are for personal use. You can use them in any version of Minecraft without restrictions.
Terms.liabilityDesc: The service is provided "as is". We don't guarantee continuous availability or the quality of results.

Editor.metaDesc: Design your Minecraft skin pixel by pixel with MakeSkins' free editor. No sign-up needed.

NotFound.subtitle: Page not found
NotFound.desc: This block doesn't exist... at least not in this world.

Gallery.title: Skin gallery
Gallery.subtitle: Download free skins made by the community or designed by us. Share yours too!
Gallery.emptyDesc: Nobody has uploaded a skin yet. Create yours and share it with the world.
